title: ParameterValueSource
description: ParameterValueSource: Object pointing at a Revit parameter as the source of a value to extract.

ParameterName.description: Name of the parameter to extract the value from.

FromType.description: If true, the value to be extracted from the underlying type, not the instance.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
